codeReview.summary: The commit implements the requested Phase 2 schema additions, migration, storage interface/methods, and dedicated storage tests. User scoping, pending+snooze resurfacing logic, ordering, and pagination behavior are implemented and covered by tests. One non-blocking semantic mismatch remains in completedAt handling.

issues.description: updateAction sets completedAt whenever data.status is "completed" or "dismissed" without checking prior state; repeated updates can overwrite the original completion timestamp even when no transition occurred.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS says every storage method requires a userId parameter, but the implemented and requested create signatures pass userId only inside payload objects. This rule is ambiguous with current repository patterns.

backend-worker skill requires manual endpoint verification (npm run dev + Invoke-RestMethod/curl), but this feature handoff only reports automated tests/typecheck while still marking procedure fully followed.
Workers encountered db:push interactivity issues on Windows and used a manual tsx migration-apply workaround, but shared command guidance still points to db:push without noting this platform caveat.

summary: Review passed. Feature scope is implemented with comprehensive tests and correct schema/storage additions; one non-blocking completedAt transition nuance was identified, plus shared-state documentation gaps around storage conventions, backend skill procedure expectations, and Windows db:push behavior.
